# [[claude|Claude]] by Anthropic in Excel

> AI Registry entry [AIR-30](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-30/claude-by-anthropic-in-excel) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-04-20. Departments: finance, office-of-ceo.

**Category:** AI Spreadsheet Agent (Excel Add-in)
**Cost per User/Month:** Included with Claude Pro/Team/Enterprise; also via Bedrock/Vertex AI/Foundry
**Departments:** Finance, Office of CEO
**Evaluator:** Ann Greed (Finance)

## Overview

Anthropic's native Excel add-in — brings Claude's reasoning into Microsoft Excel. Ask questions about any cell/formula/tab in natural language. Update assumptions without breaking formula dependencies. Debug errors. Build or populate financial models. Part of Claude product suite — not a separate vendor or subscription.

## Capabilities

* Cell and formula Q&A
* Scenario testing — update assumptions across model preserving dependencies
* Error debugging — trace #REF!, #VALUE!, circular references
* Model building from scratch or templates
* Formula integrity — non-destructive
* Real-time transparency — see Claude's changes with explanations
* Skills support — turn recurring workflows into reusable skills
* Cross-app conversation — context passes between Excel and PowerPoint
* Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Alt+C / Ctrl+Option+C

## Integrations

* Microsoft Excel native add-in
* Claude PowerPoint add-in (cross-app context)
* LLM gateway deployment via Bedrock / Vertex AI / Foundry
* Skills ecosystem

## Security & Compliance

* Inherits Anthropic enterprise (SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA-eligible)
* No new vendor onboarding — Claude already Core Infrastructure
* LLM gateway option for data residency (Vertex AI)
* No training on enterprise data

## Strategic Advantage

* No new vendor relationship or security review needed (Claude already approved)
* Cross-app story (Excel → PowerPoint) is a differentiator
* LLM gateway via Vertex AI keeps data in Janus [[google-cloud|Google Cloud]] tenant

*Sandbox — active evaluation (Urgent priority). Evaluator: Ann Greed. Comparing against [[shortcut-ai|Shortcut AI]] ([[shortcut-ai|AIR-28]]).*
